WindowsValue: Ctrl+C/V/X/Z = Copy/Paste/Cut/Undo ; Win+E = File Explorer ; Win+L = Lock screen ; Win+D = Show desktop ; Win+R = Run dialog ; Alt+Tab = Switch windows ; Ctrl+Shift+Esc = Task Manager ; Win+Shift+S = Screenshot snipping
Notes: Map to GNOME/KDE equivalents in settings_config.sh
Disable telemetry: mask telemetry in /etc/hosts + disable services
Disable location: systemctl disable geoclue + gnome-control-center
Install system_update.service + system_update.timer from the repo (see Scheduled systemd Automatic Update/Debian/service files/)
